admin.title: Authority Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Claims management · Signed in as {{name}}
admin.response_placeholder: Write your official response to this claim…

hero.h1: Every voice in education deserves to be heard.
hero.subtitle: EduVoice gives teachers, parents, and education authorities a structured, professional space to speak, report, celebrate, and improve schools together.
hero.trust: Verified accounts only · School-tagged posts · Government-adjacent framework

spaces.label: Four dedicated spaces
spaces.heading: One platform for every voice in education.
spaces.lounge_desc: A collegial space where teachers share experiences, voice challenges, and support each other.
spaces.parents_desc: A structured channel for parents to raise concerns, make suggestions, and track school responses.
spaces.claims_desc: An official, traceable channel for filing complaints to education authorities with full lifecycle tracking.
spaces.gratitude_desc: A public celebration space where parents thank exceptional teachers by name.

why.label: Why EduVoice
why.heading: Built for accountability, not just conversation.
why.structured_body: Every post has a category, a school tag, and a clear purpose. No noise, no off-topic threads.
why.traceable_body: Every post links to a verified school and user. Anonymous options exist — but the institution is always shown.
why.safe_body: Community moderators review content. Claims create permanent, tamper-proof records for authorities.

cta.heading: Ready to make your school's voice count?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of educators and parents building a better education system — one school at a time.

footer.mission: A civic platform dedicated to making every voice in education heard, documented, and acted upon — together.
footer.copyright: © 2026 EduVoice · For the Tunisian education community

login.title: Sign in as a demo user
login.subtitle: This is a demo application. Choose an account below to explore the platform with different access levels.
login.teacher_desc: Full access to all spaces, can post claims and comment everywhere.
login.parent_desc: Access to Parents' Forum and Gratitude Wall. Cannot access Claims or Staff Room interactions.
login.admin_desc: Full access including the Authority Panel to manage and respond to claims.

step1.heading: Who are you?
step1.subtitle: Select your role to personalise your EduVoice experience.
step1.teacher_desc: Licensed educator at a public or private school
step1.parent_desc: Parent or guardian of an enrolled pupil
step1.admin_link: I am a School Administrator — request access

step2.heading: Personal information
step2.subtitle: This information appears on your EduVoice profile.

step3.heading: Find your school
step3.subtitle: Select your wilaya then search for your school by name.
step3.prompt: Select a wilaya or type a school name to see results
step3.no_results: No schools found — try a different name or wilaya.

step4_teacher.heading: Educator verification
step4_teacher.subtitle: We need to confirm your educator status. Choose one method.
step4_teacher.reg_desc: Enter the number from your Ministry-issued educator card.
step4_teacher.email_desc: We'll send a one-time code to your school-issued address.

step4_parent.heading: Child enrolment details
step4_parent.subtitle: Help us link your account to your child's school record.
step4_parent.enrol_hint: Found on the school enrolment certificate issued at registration.

step5.teacher_msg: Your educator account has been created. Start engaging with parents, sharing updates, and building your classroom community.
step5.parent_msg: Your parent account is ready. Stay informed about your child's progress and connect directly with their teachers.

post_modal.claim_outcome_placeholder: Describe the resolution you are seeking…
post_modal.prior_first_step: No, this is the first step

post_modal.claim_restricted_desc: Visible only to education authorities and yourself.
